features.description: Idle background shell commands now auto-reaped under memory pressure; disable via CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BG_SHELL_PRESSURE_
features.reference_changelog_line: Added automatic memory-pressure reaping for idle background shell commands (disable with `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BG_SHELL_PRESSURE_REAP=1`)

features.description: Background agent launch result no longer instructs Claude to end its response, letting it continue other work concurrent
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved background agents: the launch result no longer instructs Claude to "end your response" — it keeps working on other tasks while the agent runs

features.description: MCP headersHelper now re-runs and reconnects automatically when a tool call returns 401/403.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved MCP `headersHelper` auth: the helper now re-runs and reconnects automatically when a tool call returns 401/403

features.description: Marketplace `renames` maps are now followed automatically, updating user settings to the new plugin name.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved plugin auto-rename: marketplace `renames` maps are now followed automatically, updating your settings to the new name

features.description: New claude_code.assistant_response OTel log event; redacted unless OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=1 or prompt logging is o
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `claude_code.assistant_response` OpenTelemetry log event containing the model's response text. Redacted unless `OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=1`; when that var is unset it follows `OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS`, so deployments that already log prompt content will start receiving response content on upgrade — set `OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=0` to keep prompts-only.

features.description: New autoMode.classifyAllShell setting routes every Bash/PowerShell command through the auto-mode classifier.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `autoMode.classifyAllShell` setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns

features.description: Auto-mode denial reasons now surface in the transcript, denial toast, and /permissions recent denials list.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and `/permissions` recent denials
